Landing.metaDescription: Eight small tools sitting on the same desk, helping you research without the rush.

hero.headline:
Leave the busywork to Mochi.

You focus on insight.
hero.lead: From transcripts to interview analysis, desk research to full reports—eight tools in one workspace handle the heavy lifting. Great research, without the late nights.
hero.postscript: P.S. Every tool is unlimited for the first 24 hours. No card required.

showcase.title:
Try it yourself.

It works just like the real thing.
showcase.subtitle: Click through the tools and watch results pile up in your workspace. No sign-up needed.
showcase.wsEmpty: Outputs from the tools you visit show up here. Click the sidebar to start.
showcase.tip: ← / → to navigate · Click the sidebar to switch tools · Use tabs for stages

whyMochi.hand:
A sweet bite,

for the weary researcher.
whyMochi.body1: Late nights, endless edits, an obsession with the smallest details—the tiny, hard-won insight that only surfaces after all of it. Countless researchers carry that weight quietly, every day, for that one insight.
whyMochi.body2: Research-Mochi wants to sit beside those researchers. To automate the repetition so you can focus on what matters—a small, certain joy at the end of a long day, like one bite of mochi.
whyMochi.perk1: Automation instead of overtime. Transcripts, interview summaries, desk research—the work that used to keep you up, Mochi handles it.
whyMochi.perk2: Mochi does the detail, you do the insight. Finding patterns in hundreds of responses is Mochi's job. Reading what they mean is yours.
whyMochi.perk3: A first draft that needs less revising. Clean structure and language from the start. Fewer feedback loops, faster turn-around.
whyMochi.coda: Why not let Mochi handle today, and pour yourself a coffee? ☕

pricing.title:
Pay only for what you use,

invoiced cleanly.
pricing.subtitle: Credits never expire · Share across your team.

voice.quote:
"Research used to feel like chores.

Now what took a whole day of writing up interviews takes an hour,

and I finally have time for the actual thinking."

faq.title: Things you might be wondering.
faq.a1: No. Once you buy credits they don't expire, and they're freely shared inside your team workspace.
faq.a2: Korean is the default. Interface, docs, emails, even invoices—Korean first. Toggle to English whenever you need it.
faq.q3: Do outputs flow automatically between tools?
faq.a3: Yes. Inside one workspace, the output of one tool becomes the input of the next. Drag-drop from the sidebar or use the send-to menu.
faq.q4: Do I have to pay right after sign-up?
faq.a4: No. The first 24 hours give you unlimited access to every tool, no card needed. Buy credits later if you like what you see.

ctaFinal.title:
A researcher's hands belong

on the thinking work.
ctaFinal.subtitle: Every tool is unlimited for the first 24 hours after sign-up. No card required, and your first output averages three minutes.

Auth.switchToSignUp: Don't have an account? Sign up

Paywall.title: This action needs credits
Paywall.body: Your free trial has ended and this action needs credits. Current balance: {balance}. Top up on the credits page and try again.

Dashboard.title: Dashboard
Dashboard.subtitle: Running jobs and recent artifacts grouped by project.
Dashboard.noOrg: Loading org info, or sign-in required.
Dashboard.emptyProject: No artifacts in this project yet.
Dashboard.firstProjectBody: Group research artifacts under projects to keep progress and next steps in one place.
Dashboard.signedOutBody: An editorial-toned research console that turns qualitative and quantitative interview data into quotes, scripts, interview results, and full reports.

Projects.title: Projects
Projects.description: Group research outputs by project for cleaner organization.
Projects.name: Name

ComingSoon.toast: This feature is on the way
ComingSoon.body: We're putting the finishing touches on this one. We'll let you know the moment it's ready.

region.title: Pick a region
region.body: Outside Korea? Korea-only sources like Naver and Daum are hidden automatically.

keyword.title: Add keywords
keyword.body: Hit Enter or comma to add a keyword. With just one, the AI expands it into four similar keywords.

sources.title: Choose sources
sources.body: Toggle Naver, Daum, YouTube, and Google News. Flat 25 credits per run.

search.title: Kick off search
search.body: Runs in the background — feel free to navigate away. Results land in your workspace when done.

upload.title: Upload files
upload.body: Audio, video, or text — all welcome. Audio and video are transcribed automatically.

convert.title: Step 1 — convert
convert.body: Convert every file to markdown in one shot. The analysis step kicks in right after.

analyze.title: Step 2 — analyze
analyze.body: Extracts shared questions and builds a matrix of per-file summaries and VOC quotes. 10 credits.

export.title: Export
export.body: Download as CSV/XLSX, or send the result to another tool from your workspace.

upload.title: Upload sources
upload.body: .docx, .md, or text — combine interviews, desk research, and notes into a single report.

generate.title: Generate the report
generate.body: 50 credits. You get an HTML preview plus .docx and .pptx downloads.

preview.title: Review the result
preview.body: The HTML preview renders here. Saved to your workspace so you can revisit it later.

upload.title: Upload audio or video
upload.body: mp3, m4a, wav, mp4, and friends. Deepgram detects the language automatically.

language.title: Pick a language
language.body: Auto-detect works, but choosing the exact language nudges accuracy higher.

download.title: Download results
download.body: Grab .docx, .md, or .csv — or send straight into the interview result generator.

requirements.title: Research window
requirements.body: Set the date range, time, and weekdays — candidate slots fill the calendar automatically.

attendees.title: Add attendees
attendees.body: Type them in or import a CSV/XLSX. Only the CSV auto-match step costs 5 credits.

calendar.title: Confirm a slot
calendar.body: Pick an attendee on the left, then click a slot in the calendar to lock it in.

upload.title: Upload data
upload.body: CSV/XLSX with one row per respondent, columns as questions. Multilingual headers detected automatically.

pickers.title: Pick row and column
pickers.body: Row = question, column = banner (gender, age band, etc.). The cross-tab renders instantly.

modes.title: Display modes
modes.body: Toggle count, column %, and row % to compare. Export the cross-tab as CSV anytime.

Concierge.mic_denied: Mic permission required. Please allow in browser settings.
Concierge.quota_exceeded: Daily limit (10 min) reached. See you tomorrow!

quotes.title: Transcript Generator
quotes.description: Convert audio/video interviews into verbatim transcripts.

uploader.dropHere: Drop audio, video, or document files here, or click to browse
uploader.supported: Supported: mp3 · m4a · wav · mp4 · mov · webm · txt · md · docx

transcripts.title: Script Generator
transcripts.description: Generate interview scripts and discussion guides.

languageConfirm.title: Use this language to transcribe?
languageConfirm.body: Transcription will run with the selected language. Choosing the wrong setting noticeably hurts accuracy — worth a quick check.

interviews.title: Interview Result Generator
interviews.description: Convert multiple interview files to .md, then build a table of summaries and VOC quotes against the shared question set.

interviewsView.stage1Help: Each file is converted to markdown. Audio/video is transcribed first; text files are wrapped as-is.
interviewsView.pipelineHint: Convert → analyze → auto-download CSV+XLSX in one click.
interviewsView.stage2Help: Extracts the shared questions from every converted file, then summarizes each respondent and pulls a VOC quote.
interviewsView.question: Question
interviewsView.needTwoFiles: At least one converted file is required.

reports.title: Full Report Generator
reports.description: Synthesize all interviews into a marketing/UX research report.
reports.typeChooserHelp: Chapter structure and signature visuals adjust to the analytical lens.

design.label: Design Evaluation
design.description: Catalog usability friction with severity and priority across issues.

marketing.label: Marketing Direction
marketing.description: Derive audience segments, JTBD, message hooks, and channel hypotheses.

strategy.label: Strategy Direction
strategy.description: Synthesize market signals into opportunity maps and strategic options.

findings.label: Findings-Faithful
findings.description: Minimize interpretation; foreground observations and verbatim density.

scheduler.title: Participant Scheduler
scheduler.description: Take candidate availability and propose interview slots with attendee notices.

moderator.title: AI Moderator
moderator.description: Generate moderator scripts and follow-up questions from your research hypotheses.

analyzer.title: Mixed-Methods Analyzer
analyzer.description: Combine qualitative and quantitative inputs to surface integrated insights.

desk.title: Desk Research
desk.description: Generate a desk-research summary from a topic, industry, or keyword set using public sources.

keywords.title: Keyword Crawling
keywords.description: Crawl top results for a keyword and capture their headlines and summaries.

recruiting.title: Recruiting
recruiting.description: Upload an RFP, brief, or email and extract participant criteria and study schedule, broken down item by item.

survey.title: AI Survey
survey.description: Generate quantitative survey questions and branching logic from your research goals and hypotheses.

quant.title: Quantitative Analysis
quant.description: Upload a CSV/XLSX of survey responses and explore question × banner cross-tabs interactively.

affinity_bubble.title: Affinity Bubble
affinity_bubble.description: Partner solution that visualizes tens of thousands of reviews as semantic clusters.

video.title: Video Analyzer
video.description: Upload user test or interview recordings and let AI analyze behavior patterns, pain points, and key moments.

translate.title: Live Interpreter
translate.description: OpenAI Realtime translates your microphone audio on the fly. Generate a share link so remote viewers see the live captions and pick the language they listen to.
translate.cost: 50 credits to start, then 10 credits per 10 minutes

voice_concierge.title: Voice Concierge
voice_concierge.description: Call Mochi by voice. Help on any screen.

Quant.dropHere: Drop a CSV/XLSX file here, or click to upload
Quant.supported: Supported: .csv · .xlsx · .xls (one row per respondent, columns = questions/attributes)
Quant.questionHint: Pick the column whose values become the rows — typically the answer column (satisfaction, preference, …).
Quant.bannerHint: Pick the segment to cross by — gender, age group, customer tier, etc.
Quant.samePickError: Pick two different columns for rows and banner.
Quant.pickPrompt: Choose row + banner columns above to render the cross-tab.

AffinityBubble.title: Affinity Bubble
AffinityBubble.description: Affinity Bubble clusters tens of thousands of user reviews / VOC into a single voronoi map of meaning. A great fit when you want to diagnose your product or a competitor's at a glance.
AffinityBubble.alt: Affinity Bubble sample — clustering of Duolingo reviews
AffinityBubble.caption: Sample: ~10K Duolingo reviews clustered into 5 user personas

Credits.pageSubtitle: Top up the credits you spend on research generations.
Credits.schemeNote: The four marquee features (Transcript, Interview Result, Desk Research, Full Report) carry the variable-cost pricing. Interviews ≤ 90 min recommended. Participant Scheduler is free in normal use; CSV uploads incur a 5-credit auto-match charge.
Credits.predictorSubtitle: Pick a bundle and drag the sliders to model your usage. Spending more on one feature naturally leaves less for the others.
Credits.predictorAtCap: Not enough budget left to increase this — reduce another feature first.
Credits.comingSoonBody: Until the gateway is integrated, top-ups go through the billing team. Email us with the credit amount you want and we'll process it within one business day.
Credits.bankEmailSent: We'll email you the payment details. Please check your inbox.
Credits.bankBody: Wire to the account below. Credits are applied within one business day after we confirm the deposit. Use the reference code as the sender name on your transfer.
Credits.bankFootnote: If you requested a tax invoice (세금계산서), we'll issue it within three business days of confirming the deposit.
Credits.paymentSuccess: Credits have been added to your account.
Credits.errorServiceUnavailable: Payment service is temporarily unavailable. Please try again later.

Desk.keywordPlaceholder: Type a keyword and press Enter
Desk.keywordHint: Enter / comma / Tab to add, Backspace to remove (up to 10)
Desk.cancelledNotice: Run was cancelled by the user.
Desk.regionKrOnlyHidden: Korea-only sources (Naver/Kakao/Daum) are hidden — they return little for non-KR queries.

inputSource.label: Input source
inputSource.tabHint: Pick a tab in the share dialog and check "Share tab audio". Chrome desktop only.

monitorMute.muteAria: Mute translated audio locally (viewers still hear it)

prompter.empty: Translated text will stream here once interpreting starts.

errors.microphone_denied: Microphone access was denied. Click the lock icon next to the URL to allow it.
errors.tab_audio_denied: Tab audio sharing was cancelled. Click Start again and approve the share dialog.
errors.tab_audio_unavailable: The surface you picked has no shareable audio. In the share dialog choose "Chrome Tab" and tick "Share tab audio" at the bottom. (Chrome desktop only.)

Workspace.emptyHint: Generated outputs from each tool will appear here.
Workspace.confirmDeleteFolder: Delete the folder "{name}"? Artifacts inside move to the project root.

Moderator.inquiryError: Failed to send. Please try again shortly.

requirements.title: Research Window
requirements.description: Enter the research schedule pre-arranged with the client. Available slots will be highlighted on the calendar.
requirements.explicitSlotsHint: Add ad-hoc slots outside the rule above.
requirements.rangeHint: Click a start day, then an end day on the calendar.

calendar.title: Calendar
calendar.noRequirement: Enter the research window above to see available slots.
calendar.pickHint: Select an attendee, then click a slot to confirm it.
calendar.timezoneMismatchHint: Times shown follow the source timezone — convert before sharing with attendees in other regions.

attendees.title: Attendees
attendees.description: Add attendees, collect their availability, and confirm a slot on the calendar.
attendees.name: Name
attendees.selectedNone: Select an attendee on the left.
attendees.importHint: CSV/XLSX — name, phone, date, start, end auto-detected. All other columns are preserved as custom fields.

AdminApiUsage.label: Admin
AdminApiUsage.title: API usage · cost · balance
AdminApiUsage.subtitle: Connected external services with current usage, cost, and remaining balance in one view.

totals.balanceHint: Only providers that expose USD balance
